EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} changed the account lockout policy in Single Sign-On (SSO) on vCenter host {event_src.host}
Event from Single Sign-On (SSO) on vCenter host {event_src.host}: {reason}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the password policy in Single Sign-On (SSO) on vCenter host {event_src.host}
